hooks.command: FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // .new_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.rb$'; then bundle exec rubocop -a "$FILE" --format quiet 2>/dev/null || true; fi

INPUT=$(cat); ACTIVE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.stop_hook_active' 2>/dev/null); if [ "$ACTIVE" = 'true' ]; then exit 0; fi; echo "--- Session complete. Did you run bin/ci before finishing? If not, run it now. ---" >&2; exit 0

echo "{\"additionalContext\": \"Current git branch: $(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown'). Uncommitted changes: $(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ') files.\"}"
